title: selaginella acanthostachys
intro: Selaginella acanthostachys, also known as the prickly spike spikemoss, is a type of evergreen, terrestrial plant belonging to the Selaginellaceae family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Selaginella acanthostachys include reducing oxidative stress, improving cardiovascular health, and exhibiting antimicrobial and antifungal activities. Selaginella acanthostachys is often prepared as a tea or capsule, and its extracts have also been incorporated into topical creams and ointments for skin and wound care.
